report.title: e-Surveyor: Conservation Statuses
report.description: Report for a user's species data conservation statuses in e-Surveyor
report.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT 'Your area' AS category, lr.local_rarity AS designation, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN esurveyor.local_rarity lr ON lr.tvk=cttl.external_key AND lr.sq100km='#sq100km#' #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'GB' AS category, mt.national_rarity AS designation, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN esurveyor.moth_traits mt ON mt.tvk=cttl.external_key #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2 ), ranked AS ( SELECT category, CASE WHEN category_count > 5 AND category_rank > 4 THEN 'Other' ELSE designation END AS designation, occurrence_count, species_count FROM ( SELECT category, designation, occurrence_count, species_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY category ORDER BY species_count DESC, designation ) AS category_rank, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY category) AS category_count FROM base ) s ) SELECT category, designation, SUM(occurrence_count) AS occurrence_count, SUM(species_count) AS species_count FROM ranked GROUP BY 1, 2
